message:
Fix bugs in transcript utils and CLI update command

- Fix detectLanguage: Move diff detection before YAML to handle '---' correctly
- Fix formatBytes: Handle NaN/Infinity inputs properly
- Fix updateCommand: Remove unused locationName parameter
- Add error handling for resolveSafeChildPath in update command

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
